title: Hollywood Merge
notes:
Update Now for Exciting New Features!
- Episode 67 is here — the moment the music plays, your heart gives everything away. Where does this love story go from here?
- Summer Green Stickers Event: A brand-new season kicks off June 23. Collect limited-edition stickers and unlock awesome rewards!
- New Equestrian Pass: Unlocking June 23 — join us to claim exclusive rewards and take on exciting challenges!
- New Merge Event: Zodiac Secrets arrives June 26 — listen to the whispers of the stars.

title: عهد الأبطال: نصل الحق
notes:
الإطلاق الرسمي في 8 يونيو الساعة 10:00 صباحاً (UTC+3)!
أيها الساهرون، استعدوا لكتابة مجدكم الخاص في عالم مليء بالرمال الذهبية، السحر القديم، والبطولات اللانهائية.
⏳ موعد فتح السيرفر

 الوقت: 10:00 صباحاً (UTC+3) 
لقد دقت طبول الحرب! حمل اللعبة الآن، صمم شخصيتك، وكن أول من يسيطر على العرش في 8 يونيو.

title: Kiss of War - قبلة الحرب
notes:
1. Updated the World Boss feature.
2. Updated the Guild Boss feature.
3. Fixed several bugs.

title: MadOut 2: Grand Racing games
notes:
- "Car Theft" Event: A new, risky opportunity to earn money has appeared in the city. During the event, find suitable cars, steal them, and deliver them to the drop-off points before you're stopped. The cleaner your job, the higher the reward.
- "Lost Cargo" Event: Planes periodically fly over the city, dropping valuable cargo containers. Get to the drop-off point, open the container, collect the loot, and deliver it to the drop-off point. But be prepared: such cargo can be quite a hunt.
- Angel
title_kr: MadOut 2: 온라인 게임 RP 자동차 월드

title: Clash of Critters
notes:
1. Added new Lightning Tatari: Glowfly with unique Horde Invasion skills.
2. New Tier 4: Humbug→Hierotyrus (Rock), Zaplet→Umbraveil (Lightning).
3. Island Goldrush: Territory Defenders, faster point gains, league rewards final day.
4. Battle: class adjustments, Sand Control/Warship Roll fixes, Dojo bugfix.
5. Evolve Trials: preview higher tiers, event indicators, accurate switch tips.
6. Social: no invites/msgs from blocked players, profile via own avatar.

title: Dice Dreams™
notes:
Thanks for playing Dice Dreams! We are working hard to improve the game with every release.

In this version, we've added a variety of updates and improvements to enhance your experience.

We hope you enjoy the game!

title: Kingdom Clash：Medieval Defence
notes:

Several reported issues have been fixed, along with various known problems.
General stability and game experience have also been improved.
